/** * Removes control characters (char <= 31) from both ends of this String, handling {@code null} by returning {@code null}. * *

* To trim your choice of characters, use the {@link #strip(String, String)} methods. *

* * 
{@code
     * StringUtils.trim(null)          = null
     * StringUtils.trim("")            = ""
     * StringUtils.trim("abc\u0000")   = "abc"
     * StringUtils.trim("abc")         = "abc"
     * StringUtils.trim(" abc ")       = " abc "
     * }
* * @param str the String to be trimmed, may be null. * @return the trimmed string, {@code null} if null String input. * @since 3.21.0 */
entity_signature: public static String trimControl(final String str)
